name: WooCommerce
description: WooCommerce is an open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress providing a REST API to manage online stores. Agents can manage products, orders, customers, coupons, categories, reports, shipping, taxes, and webhooks on any WooCommerce-powered site.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products with filtering by status, category, tag, and SKU.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single product by ID with all details.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product with name, type, price, description, and categories.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing product by ID.

capabilities.name: products_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a product by ID.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with filtering by status, customer, and dates.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details of a specific order.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new order with line items and customer info.

capabilities.name: orders_update
capabilities.description: Update an order status, note, or addresses.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer.

capabilities.name: coupons_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all discount coupons.

capabilities.name: coupons_create
capabilities.description: Create a new discount coupon.

capabilities.name: categories_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all product categories.

capabilities.name: categories_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product category.

capabilities.name: reports_sales
capabilities.description: Retrieve sales report with totals for a date range.

capabilities.name: reports_top_sellers
capabilities.description: Retrieve best-selling products report.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Create a refund for an order.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for store events.
